title: Create P9 handoff protocol
objective:
Create file governance/protocols/HANDOFF_PROTOCOL_CLAUDE_GPT.md with content '# BEM-525 | P9 Handoff Protocol Claude ↔ GPT

Date: 2026-05-17 | 11:25 (UTC+3)

## Purpose
Formalize Claude ↔ GPT handoff without issue #31 comments, schedule triggers, or paid OpenAI API.

## Roles
Claude handles direct patches, architecture changes, complex governance cleanup, and recovery when Python executor cannot perform a file operation.
GPT handles autonomous Deno write-channel execution, status checks, proof/result verification, and final operator reports only when a block is completed or a precise blocker exists.

## Channels
GPT write channel: Deno createCodexTask only.
GPT status channel: getCodexStatus only.
Reports: governance/codex/results, governance/reports, governance/transport/results.jsonl.
Issue #31 comments are forbidden.
Schedule triggers are forbidden.
Paid OpenAI API and Codex CLI are forbidden in the active executor architecture.

## Handoff payload
Each handoff must include: BEM id, phase, completed commits, changed files, blocker or blocker=null, one next autonomous block, and explicit constraints: no issue comments, no schedule, no paid API.

## Operator-facing report rule
GPT does not report dispatch or queued as a completed block. GPT reports only completed commit SHA, stage closure, roadmap closure, or exact blocker.

## Executor policy
Active executor is free Python executor on ubuntu-latest. Claude direct patch is used for operations outside executor capability.

## PASS criteria
Protocol file exists, done marker exists, PASS report exists, no issue comments, no schedule triggers, no paid OpenAI API.' Also create file governance/tasks/done/P9_HANDOFF_PROTOCOL.md with content 'P9 Handoff Protocol completed. Protocol: governance/protocols/HANDOFF_PROTOCOL_CLAUDE_GPT.md. No issue comments. No schedule triggers. No paid OpenAI API.' Also create file governance/reports/bem525_p9_handoff_protocol.md with content 'BEM-525 P9 PASS. Handoff Protocol Claude GPT created. Evidence: governance/protocols/HANDOFF_PROTOCOL_CLAUDE_GPT.md and governance/tasks/done/P9_HANDOFF_PROTOCOL.md. Blocker null.' No issue comments.
